justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly understood "in 3 days at 10" as June 5th at 10 AM, but the initial search was too narrow, leading to no results.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative slots when the user's preferred time was unavailable and then successfully booked the user's chosen alternative.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made two API calls in the first turn, one of which was too narrow, and then two more in the second turn to check for the user's updated preferences.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent clearly presenting options and confirming the booking without any issues.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well by understanding the user's updated preferences and checking for availability within the new, broader timeframe.
